subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Your letter was received, and due to lack of time I am compelled to be brief. During my perusal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بنده پروردگارا نامه شما رسید از عدم مجال در جواب مجبور باختصارم در حین تلاوت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for martyrs, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @law of obligatory prayer
